summary: Completed testing of 401 simulator removal and BUG-039 fix. Successfully verified that 401 simulator is completely removed and no leftover debug logs remain. COD order flow works correctly, and order success page loads with proper bill summary data.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Failed to fetch restaurant config: TypeError: Failed to fetch
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Menu still loads despite config fetch failure

integration_issues.issue: Table validation prevents order completion with test table IDs

passed_tests: TC1: Normal COD order flow - Successfully completed order #000558 in takeaway mode
TC3: 401 simulator completely removed - No window.__simulate401Done references found
TC5: No leftover debug logs - Console clean of BUG-P2-001, BUG-P2-003, BUG-P2-004, BUG-040 DEBUG messages
TC6: Order success page loads correctly with bill summary data
Payment method selector working - Can switch between 'Pay Online' and 'Pay at Counter'
Menu loading functional with 211 ADD buttons when using QR code simulation
Order details display correctly on success page (Order ID, items, bill breakdown)
Auto-login working correctly with provided credentials

success_percentage.backend: 90% (Minor restaurant config fetch issue, core order APIs working)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Main flows working, table validation blocking some dine-in scenarios)

action_item_for_main_agent: Table validation in dine-in mode prevents testing with test table IDs. TC2 (Online Payment/Razorpay) and TC4 (Edit Order flow) need valid table IDs to complete full testing. Consider providing valid test table IDs or temporarily disabling table validation for testing.
